headline: Guy Spends 8 Hours Curating 'Aesthetic' Coffee Photo, Forgets To Actually Drink The Coffee
summary: The latte art melted into an unrecognizable blob during his 47th lighting adjustment.
fullBody: Bradley Snapwell spent his entire Sunday arranging a single latte for Instagram. 'I needed the perfect shadow gradient,' Snapwell explained. By the time he adjusted the ring light, changed three backgrounds, and tried 12 angles, the coffee had gone cold and the foam art had collapsed into 'a beige tragedy.' He posted it anyway with the caption 'vibes' and got 12 likes, mostly from his mom.
